edges.detail: No fence or dependency preserves the W->W program-order edge.
External communication edge is always part of global order.
Control dependency orders later stores only (rule 11); this successor is not a store.
External communication edge is always part of global order.

reason: Cycle is broken: program-order edge(s) p0_wx->p0_wy, p1_ry->p1_rx are not preserved by RVWMO PPO. (PBMT=NC is non-cacheable main memory and obeys RVWMO per Svpbmt, so this verdict equals the cacheable twin; the plain body lets herd7 cross-check it.) (herd7 not on PATH; no cross-check performed.)
